episode_title: KT #755 - DR PHIL (ADAM RAY) + SAL VULCANO, + GREG FITZSIMMONS

1.premise: Outrage in Minneapolis implies police controversy, not anger at wine experts.

2.premise: Sommeliers "whine" because wine and whine sound the same.

1.premise: Don Lemon's arrest turns the idiom "when life gives you lemons" into legal advice.
Jewish people are widely understood to be visually identifiable in a way undercover cops are not.

4.premise: Disability terms read literally expose absurd meanings in everyday language.

1.premise: "Retarded" provokes defensiveness because the description applies to so many people.

2.premise: "MS in business" reads as a degree in running meetings with multiple sclerosis, not a master's degree.

lines.text: How we doing, mother shit? Hell yeah!
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: A lot of crazy stuff going on in Minneapolis.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Why's everybody mad at all these sommeliers?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Kind of -- They whine a lot, but that's cool. Whatever.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Don Lemon recently got arrested. That shit's crazy.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Just goes to show you when life gives you lemons,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: get legal aid.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I don't know what you did, but whatever.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Ah. All right, buckle in, guys.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: What is the difference between a Jewish person
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and an undercover cop?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You may never know you were talking to a cop.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Thank you.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: All right, guys, I think the reason the word retarded
lines.label: setup

lines.text: is such a defensive word is because so many people are.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You can see it everywhere.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I saw a school that said, "Get your MS in business."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I'm like, "Who wants to run a board meeting
lines.label: setup

lines.text: with multiple sclerosis?"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Can you imagine standing in front of everybody going,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "This company is built on a solid foundation!"
lines.label: tag

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff
